phrasal_verbs.meaning: take care of a child until he or she becomes an adult
have an argument with sb and stop being friends

B.title: Circle the correct word
B.instructions: Choose the correct option in each sentence.

questions.sentence: After university, Marta wanted to be **single / independent** and live alone.
